/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++14 -Wall -Wextra -g3 -ferror-limit=3 -fcolor-diagnostics  -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-unused-function -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-missing-braces -Wno-unused-private-field -fsanitize=address -fno-limit-debug-info -g3 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/main_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/eigen_interop_helpers_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/halfedge_geometry_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/halfedge_mesh_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/halfedge_mutation_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/intrinsic_triangulation_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/linear_algebra_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/load_test_meshes.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/point_cloud_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/poisson_disk_sampler_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/polygon_operators_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/stl_reader_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/geometry-central-test.dir/src/surface_misc_test.cpp.o" -o bin/geometry-central-test  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgeometry-central.a lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libspqr.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libtbb.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libtbbmalloc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcholmod.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libccolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libamd.dylib -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl /opt/homebrew/lib/libsuitesparseconfig.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libmetis.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libumfpack.dylib
